definition: Indication or disease program such as RA IBD SLE MS cancer immunity
Affected CD4 state or subset such as Treg Th1 Th17 Tfh exhausted activated
Effect size on disease-relevant CD4 state module or signature
Therapeutic direction: inhibit activate degrade block ligand restore or uncertain
score_or_rule: uncertain direction caps call at validate

definition: Whether perturbation supports causal disease-relevant pathway not passenger effect
score_or_rule: 0 none; 3 interpretable CD4 pathway effect; 5 orthogonal or rescue support

definition: Whether target and signature match patient disease biology
primary_sources: GWT; patient scRNA; Open Targets; GWAS/eQTL
score_or_rule: 0 no link; 3 disease CD4 program; 5 patient plus genetics support

definition: GWAS rare variant eQTL/sQTL colocalization MR LoF/GoF directionality
primary_sources: Open Targets Genetics; GWAS Catalog; ClinVar

definition: Likely modality: small molecule antibody biologic ASO siRNA PROTAC cell/gene therapy
primary_sources: Open Targets tractability; ChEMBL; UniProt; PDB; HPA
score_or_rule: required for advance unless clear validation goal

definition: Feasibility based on pocket epitope localization ligand precedent delivery
score_or_rule: 0 none; 3 plausible modality; 5 approved/clinical asset or validated binder

definition: On-target and immune safety window including expression breadth essentiality known adverse effects
primary_sources: Open Targets safety; DepMap; GTEx; FAERS; literature
score_or_rule: 0 killer risk; 3 risk known but testable; 5 supportive genetics/function

definition: Infection risk global immunosuppression cytokine release autoimmunity Treg/Th17 imbalance
primary_sources: GWT stress/cytokine signatures; immunology literature; cytokine assays

definition: Availability of target engagement PD or patient-selection biomarkers
score_or_rule: 0 none; 3 RNA PD signature; 5 protein/flow/qPCR/ELISA marker

definition: Robustness across donors conditions datasets and disease models
primary_sources: GWT metadata; public scRNA; primary cell validation
score_or_rule: 0 single weak signal; 3 replicated dataset; 5 primary/disease ex vivo/in vivo support

definition: Indication endpoint patient subgroup competitor differentiation and development path
score_or_rule: 0 no path; 3 plausible indication; 5 clear biomarker/endpoints/path

definition: Stage-gated readiness class derived from domain scores and red flags
score_or_rule: R0 deprioritize; R1 exploratory; R2 hypothesis-ready; R3 validation-ready; R4 program-candidate; R5 nomination-ready

definition: Most important next experiment or data overlay to reduce uncertainty
